TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Venezuela hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 66 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 912,050 sq km (maki' tay 33 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 882,050 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 30,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 30,912,302. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 24.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 52.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 23.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Caracas. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Nicol√°s Maduro, aring ryax 19 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *enezuela ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, ** ** w na nan-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ara ¶~ ®as~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ni ¶~ ®ol*s~…ē ma*uro, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Venezuela hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 66 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 912,050 sq km (maki' tay 33 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 882,050 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 30,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 30,912,302. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 24.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 52.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 23.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Caracas. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Nicol√°s Maduro, aring ryax 19 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *enezuela ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, ** ** w na nan-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ara ¶~ ®as~…ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ni ¶~ ®ol*s~…ē ma*uro, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
